message:
feat(frame,conformance): add boolean mask type validation and error-path conformance support

crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs (+71 lines):
- Add type validation in Series::filter() ensuring mask contains only
  boolean or null values; returns FrameError::CompatibilityRejected
  with descriptive message if non-boolean dtypes found
- Add identical validation in DataFrame::filter_rows() for consistency
- Include two unit tests validating rejection behavior for non-boolean masks

crates/fp-conformance/src/lib.rs (+66/-12 lines):
- Enhance series_filter operation handling in run_fixture_operation() and
  execute_and_compare_differential() to support three expected outcome modes:
  ResolvedExpected::Series (validates output), ResolvedExpected::ErrorContains
  (validates error message substring), ResolvedExpected::ErrorAny (validates
  any error occurred)
- Error messages are now captured and compared instead of immediately
  propagating, enabling error-path conformance testing

Part of FP-P2C-010 series loc/iloc error-path conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
